scripts.build: remotion render src/index.ts lyric-video out/lyric-video.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 18 --pixel-format yuv420p --browser-executable "C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe"
scripts.build:vertical: remotion render src/index.ts lyric-video-vertical out/lyric-video-vertical.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 18 --pixel-format yuv420p --browser-executable "C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe"
